title: Enchantment Basics
quickAnswer: Enchantments add special effects to tools, armor, and weapons. For practical play, focus first on utility staples like Unbreaking, Mending, Efficiency, Protection, and Sharpness or Power.
keyFacts: Every enchantment has its own max level and valid item types, so not every book fits every item.
Important conflicts include Silk Touch vs Fortune and multiple damage enchant choices on the same weapon class.
Villager trading is the most reliable way to target specific top-tier books once you have a stable trading setup.
commonMistakes: Spending levels on random table rolls when you really need a targeted villager book.
Combining items inefficiently and hitting anvil cost limits earlier than necessary.
